tests.title: FG-E2E-001 lists functional groups for the selected industry context
FG-E2E-002 shows the add icon in the Functional Group column header
FG-E2E-003 opens the Create Functional Group popup from the add icon
FG-E2E-004 shows Create Functional Group as the popup title
FG-E2E-005 keeps Name mandatory while Description and Domain Type remain optional
FG-E2E-006 accepts a 50 character name and blocks a 51 character name
FG-E2E-007 saves a functional group with Name only
FG-E2E-008 does not save a blank functional group name
FG-E2E-009 blocks duplicate functional group names on add
tests.details: Error: [2mexpect([22m[31mlocator[39m[2m).[22mtoContainText[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m failed Locator: locator('.error-banner') Expected pattern: [32m/duplicate|exists|already/i[39m Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found Call log: [2m - Expect "toContainText" with timeout 5000ms[22m [2m - waiting for locator('.error-banner')[22m

FG-E2E-022 asks for confirmation before deleting a functional group
FG-E2E-023 deletes a functional group when it has no child PWO
